video_title: Salesforce Trailhead Tutorial | Salesforce Trailhead Explained - how to Use It | Edureka

segments.text: Hello everyone, I am Nithi from Adirika and I welcome you back to Adirika's YouTube channel.
And today's exciting session where we'll explore Salesforce Trailhead.
Before we get into the details, make sure to subscribe to our YouTube channel and hit
the bell icon to stay updated on latest content from Adirika.
If you're looking to boost your career in Salesforce ecosystem, Adirika's Salesforce training
course offers comprehensive instructor-led online training designed by industry experts.
This program covers essential topics like Salesforce objects and fields, security controls,
validations and workflow rules, data management, application lifecycle and Salesforce cloud service.
You will gain hands-on experience through real-world projects, preparing you for Salesforce
administrator and platform app builder certification exams.
With lifetime access of course material and 24-7 support, Adirika ensures a flexible
and supportive learning environment.
So don't miss this opportunity and advance your Salesforce skills and career.
Visit Adirika's website to learn more and enroll today.
The link to this course is in the description box below.
Now let's get started.
So now let's outline what we will cover in this video.
First we will cover what Salesforce Trailhead is and how it helps you to learn Salesforce
through hands-on modules and guided parts.
Next we will explore the key features like game-wide learning, skill-based badges and real-world
projects.
Then we will look at the benefits of learning via Trailhead from career growth to industry
recognized certifications.
Finally I will show you how to use Trailhead so you can start your learning journey today.
So now let's talk about Trailhead, a Salesforce official learning platform.
Trailhead is a free interactive platform that helps you to learn Salesforce in a fun and
engaging way.
Instead of traditional courses, it offers you guided modules, hands-on projects and super
badges to help you develop real-world skills.
So what sets Trailhead apart is its gamified learning experience.
As you complete lessons you will earn badges and points.
Learning learning into engaging and rewarding journey.
So best of all it is completely free and helps you to build the industry recognized skills
that can give your Salesforce career a significant boost.
So now that we know what Trailhead is and why it is valuable, let's dive into the key
features and see how it makes the learning Salesforce easy and fun.
So the first point that we have is guided learning parts.

skills.
The next one that we have is hands-on projects and super badges.
Learn by doing.
Trailhead provides real-world projects and super badges that test your skills giving you hands-on
experience employers look for.
And the next one is Trailblazer community.
Learning that Trailblazer community to connect with Salesforce experts ask questions, share
insights and grow your professional network.
The next point that we have is certification preparation.
Trailhead helps you to prepare for Salesforce certification with dedicated learning parts
making it easier to boost your career.
And the next point that we have is free and self-paced learning.
Best of all, Trailhead is completely free and lets you learn at your own pace.
Making it ideal for beginners and professional life.
So now that we have explored the Trailhead's key features, let's talk about the benefits
of learning Trailhead and how it can accelerate your sales for journey.
So the first point that we have is hands-on skill development.
Trailhead focuses on practical learning allowing you to apply concepts in real-world scenarios

The next point that we have is career growth and job readiness.
With structural learning part and certification prep, Trailhead helps you to build highly demanded
skill faster making your job ready.
The next point that we have is engaging and fun learning.
Learning on Trailhead is interactive and gamified, keeping you motivated with badges, points
and real-world challenges.
The next point that we have is globally recognized learning.
Trailhead is trusted by professional worldwide and completing its module can add credibility
to your resume and LinkedIn profile.
The next point that we have is flexible and self-paced.
Whether you are a student working professional or career switcher, Trailhead allows you to
learn anytime, anywhere at your own pace.
So now that we know the benefits, let's talk about how can you get started with Trailhead
and begin your journey.
